news-global-econ.title: Colombia Ready for Sunday Presidential Runoff Between Abelardo de la Espriella and Ivan Cepeda
news-global-econ.description:
Colombians are hours away from electing their president for the next four years in Sunday's runoff election between frontrunner conservative outsider Abelardo de la Espriella and far-left Senator Iván Cepeda.

news-global-econ.title: Kevin O'Leary warns China is winning the AI race because U.S. states are slowing data center production
news-global-econ.description: Kevin O'Leary says building data centers is critical to beating China in the AI race, citing advanced cooling technology and national security concerns.

news-global-econ.title: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces potential leadership challenge from newly-elected Andy Burnham
news-global-econ.description: Labour's Andy Burnham won a special election on Friday and gained a seat in Parliament. He has openly spoken about challenging Keir Starmer as leader.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian and Israeli athletes react to memorandum of understanding to end US-Iran war
news-global-soc.description: Former Iranian wrestler Sardar Pashei and Israeli Olympian AJ Edelman criticize the U.S.-Iran deal, calling it a dangerous lifeline for the regime.
